rows.label: qev091902_MSG0001
rows.name:
There's our subject. This may be just a
test to us, but he doesn't know that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0002
rows.name: So don't let your guard down.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0003
rows.name:
Oh! Wait, wait! There's an even
BIGGER critter over there![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0004
rows.name:
I fought him during a Doll test once. He
was tough, but the data was INSAAAAANE![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0005
rows.name:
He wasn't in Tika's orders, but we
could use him in our test anyway.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091902_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev091902_SEL0011
rows.name:
Claim that the bigger the subject
is, the better the data should be.

rows.label: qev091902_JNK0020
rows.name: Object

rows.label: qev091902_SEL0021
rows.name:
Say that the prototype might
not be up to the task.

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0006
rows.name: Absolutely![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0007
rows.name:
No science ever advanced without a
little bit of crazy, am I right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0008
rows.name: Let's get cracking![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0009
rows.name:
Hmm, this is true. Our current
equipment IS a little bit lacking.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0010
rows.name:
And data doesn't help anyone if
we all get killed and junk...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0011
rows.name:
You're right. Let's avoid unnecessary
risks and focus on our assigned target.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0012
rows.name: That's a wrap![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0013
rows.name:
Not quite as fun as a Doll test,
but still pretty great, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0029
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0030
rows.name:
Say that you wouldn't mind
more missions like this one.

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0031
rows.name: Disagree

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0032
rows.name: Say that you were bored.

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0014
rows.name:
Ground-gear tests are fun,
right? I mean, in moderation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0015
rows.name:
Half the time these projects get
scrapped because the data sucks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0016
rows.name: But today felt really good![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0017
rows.name:
I hope this thing makes
it to production.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0018
rows.name:
It'd feel great to know our work
ended up saving lives, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0019
rows.name:
Really? Sorry to hear that.
I thought it was fun.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0020
rows.name:
Oh, you meant it was boring
compared to a Doll test! Yeah,
I totally feel you there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0021
rows.name:
But ground gear is still
important, and any test worth
doing is worth doing right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0022
rows.name:
Plus, if this tech makes it to
market, it could be a huge
boost for BLADEs everywhere.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0023
rows.name: Sorry! Sorry. I'm rambling again, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091902_MSG0024
rows.name:
Tika's waiting for our
report, so let's head back.[ST:wait ]
